inputs.label: Monthly Expenses
inputs.businessContext: Total monthly cash outflows (operational costs, rent, salaries).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total monthly cash outflows (operational costs, rent, salaries).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Toplam aylık nakit çıkışları (operasyonel maliyetler, kira, maaşlar).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Sorties de trésorerie mensuelles totales (coûts opérationnels, loyer, salaires).
businessContext_i18n.es: Salidas de efectivo mensuales totales (costos operativos, alquiler, salarios).
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي التدفقات النقدية الخارجة الشهرية (التكاليف التشغيلية، الإيجار، الرواتب).

inputs.label: Monthly Revenue
inputs.businessContext: Total monthly cash inflows from sales or other income.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total monthly cash inflows from sales or other income.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Satışlardan veya diğer gelirlerden elde edilen toplam aylık nakit girişleri.
businessContext_i18n.de: Monatliche Mittelzuflüsse aus Verkäufen oder anderen Einnahmen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Entrées de trésorerie mensuelles totales provenant des ventes ou autres revenus.
businessContext_i18n.es: Entradas de efectivo mensuales totales por ventas u otros ingresos.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي التدفقات النقدية الداخلة الشهرية من المبيعات أو الدخل الآخر.

inputs.label: Cash Buffer (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of cash reserved as a safety buffer, not used in runway calculation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of cash reserved as a safety buffer, not used in runway calculation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Nakit rezerv olarak ayrılan yüzde, nakit akışı hesaplamasında kullanılmaz.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz der Barmittel, der als Sicherheitspuffer reserviert und nicht in der Reichweitenberechnung verwendet wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nakit rezerv olarak ayrılan yüzde, işletme süresi hesaplamasında kullanılmaz.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de efectivo reservado como colchón de seguridad, no utilizado en el cálculo de la pista.
businessContext_i18n.ar: النسبة المئوية من النقد المحجوزة كاحتياطي أمان، لا تُستخدم في حساب المدرج النقدي.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
